zcobol-validation.enableUnprotectedDispl.description: Enable unprotected display validation (outside IF blocks)

zcobol-validation.enableUnmatchedIfCheck.description: Enable IF without matching END-IF validation

zcobol-validation.enableIfWithoutElseChe.description: Enable IF without ELSE validation (disabled by default)

zcobol-validation.enableEvaluateWithoutW.description: Enable EVALUATE without WHEN OTHER validation (disabled by default)

zcobol-validation.enableHardcodedCheck.description: Enable hardcoded value validation (strings and number literals)

zcobol-validation.enableVarsInProcedureC.description: Enable validation for variables/constants declared in PROCEDURE DIVISION - they should be in WORKING-STORAGE SECTION

zcobol-validation.enableLowerCaseCheck.description: Enable lowercase code validation - COBOL should be written in uppercase (disabled by default)

zcobol-validation.enableSymbolicOperator.description: Enable symbolic operator validation (<, >, =) in IF conditions, suggesting LESS THAN, GREATER THAN, EQUAL

zcobol-validation.operatorFormat.description: Format of compound operators in validation suggestions

zcobol-validation.enableHardcodedInStrin.description: Enable hardcoded value validation inside STRING and UNSTRING functions

zcobol-validation.enableHardcodedInDispl.description: Enable hardcoded value validation inside DISPLAY commands

zcobol-validation.defaultIfCondition.description: Default condition for IF blocks (example: '1 = 1' or 'WS-FLAG = 'S'')

zcobol-validation.constantPrefix.description: Prefix used to generate constant names (e.g., 'con-' generates con-value)

zcobol-validation.constantGroupName.description: Name of the group data structure for constants (e.g., 'CON-CONSTANTS'). If specified, new constants will be created as level 05 items under this group. If empty, constants are created as independent level 01 items.

zcobol-validation.enableCursorOperations.description: Enable cursor operations validation (OPEN, FETCH, CLOSE)
